memory:memory/2026-04-22.md:108:153.snippet: 3. **Adaptive thresholds** — Different thresholds for different environments (dev vs prod) 4. **Preview before execution** — Use dryRun to log what would be done 5. **Selective maintenance** — Task whitelist for targeted cleanup **Time savings:** - Manual maintenance decision-making → automated health-based triggering - No need to remember which tasks to run → autoMaintain figures it out - Preview capabilities → avoid unexpected operations **Integration example:** ```typescript // Agent startup const health = await mem.svc.autoMaintain({ threshold: 75 }); if (health.triggered) { console.log('Maintenance executed:', health.actions); } // Heartbeat / cron setInterval(async () => { const

memory:memory/2026-04-14.md:1:38.snippet: # 2026-04-14 - Daily Memory ## 📅 日期与时间 - **日期**: 2026-04-14（周二） - **时区**: Asia/Shanghai (GMT+8) --- ## 🧪 Agent Memory Service 开发 ### 新项目: agent-memory-service - **位置**: `projects/agent-memory-service/` - **状态**: ✅ v0.1.0 完成, 31/31 tests pass - **特点**: - Mem0 风格三层存储: Core(L0,永不过期) / Long(L1,30天半衰期) / Short(L2,1天半衰期) - 自动记忆提取 Pipeline: 偏好/事实/决策/实体/上下文 - 多策略检索: 关键词 + n-gram语义相似度 + 时间衰减 + 层级加权 - Ebbinghaus 遗忘曲线衰减 - 访问增强（recall即复习） - 内容哈希去重 - JSON文件持久化 - 零外部依赖 ### 设计决策 - 不用 SQLite，用 JSON 文件 — 更简单，零依赖 - n-gram 相似度替代 embedding — 不需要 API，离线可用 - 规则提取替代 LLM 提取 — 快速原型，后续可升级 ### 后续改进方向 - [x] **Memory Consolidation** — 合并相关短期记忆为更强长期记忆（v0.2.0, 54/54 tests）✅ 2026-04-15 key-dev-2 - [
conceptTags: 偏好/事实/决策/实体/上下文
